plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL, TQQQ) to zero.
Trim SMH and CRWD to reduce sector concentration.
Trim SPY to address the 30% concentration flag.
Buy GOOGL as a high-scoring growth opportunity.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a larger cash buffer.
Expect lower volatility and a target return around 1.5% per month.
conservative.read: This mode focuses on capital preservation by eliminating leveraged ETFs and reducing concentration. Expect lower volatility and a target return of approximately 1.5% per month, with a focus on minimizing drawdowns.

plan: Trim SOXL and sell SPAL to reduce leverage risk.
Trim SMH and CRWD to lower sector concentration.
Trim SPY to address the concentration flag.
Buy GOOGL and RTX, strong names from the scanner.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
Expect a target return of approximately 2.5% per month with moderate risk.
balanced.read: This balanced approach aims for risk-first growth, trimming leverage and concentration while adding quality names. Expect a target return of approximately 2.5% per month, with a moderate level of risk.

plan: Increase SOXL exposure to leverage upside potential.
Add to SMH and CRWD, concentrating in tech/semis.
Trim SPY to reduce broad index concentration.
Buy GOOGL and DDOG, top-rated scanner setups.
Buy RTX as another high R setup.
This plan leverages growth but significantly increases drawdown risk.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan aims for stretched growth by increasing leverage and concentration in high-conviction names. Expect a higher target return of approximately 4% per month, but be aware of significantly increased drawdown risk and potential for rapid losses due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL, TQQQ) and volatile single names (SMH, CRWD).
Trim SPY to reduce concentration.
Increase QQQI significantly for income generation.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions.
Expect a target return of approximately 1% per month.
This is for income, not aggressive growth.
income.read: This income-focused mode shifts towards steady monthly distributions by selling leveraged and high-beta assets, increasing QQQI. Expect a target return of approximately 1% per month, prioritizing low drawdown and reliable income over growth. Note that distributions are variable and NAV can still fall.
